title: Metals gain as China's power issues threaten to curb supply
section_path: Metals gain as China's power issues threaten to curb supply
section_path_text: Metals gain as China's power issues threaten to curb supply
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Supply side issues helped offset ongoing concerns of weaker economic growth. A weaker USD also provided some support. Aluminium gained as threats of further curbs on output rose.
